title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bajaj Auto - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bajaj Auto - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Auto is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bajaj Auto:
Bajaj Auto is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Auto!
